offer: For property managers handling 5–15 properties/month, the complexity of compliance requirements causes missed deadlines. We automate compliance audit report preparation instead of manual report generation using spreadsheets.
problem: Difficulty in generating timely compliance audit reports.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Indie Hackers discussions on compliance tools

try_it: Let users try template-based report generation and dashboard for compliance tracking

Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save frequently used inputs as templates
Allow CSV import for existing data
